videoSnippet.title: No Moustache no Power? || Magnus vs Javokhir || Titled Tuesday FINAL ROUND

Carlsen, Magnus (3361) - Sindarov, Javokhir (3212) 
Titled Tuesday Grand Prix 2025-2026 (Chess.com) [11] 2026.02.24
A15 English, 1...Nf6 (Anglo-Indian defense)

1.c4 Nf6 2.g3 c5 3.Bg2 g6 4.Nc3 Bg7 5.Nh3 Nc6 6.Nf4 d6 7.b3 Bd7 8.Bb2 O-O 9.O-O a6 10.d3 Rb8 11.Qd2 b5 12.Ncd5 e6 13.Nxf6+ Bxf6 14.Bxf6 Qxf6 15.e3 Rfd8 16.Rfd1 Be8 17.Rac1 bxc4 18.dxc4 a5 19.Ne2 a4 20.bxa4 Ne5 21.Nc3 Nf3+ 22.Bxf3 Qxf3 23.e4 Rb4 24.Nb5 Qxe4 25.Nxd6 Rxd6 26.Qxd6 Bc6 27.Rd5 Rxc4 28.Qb8+ Kg7 29.Qb2+ Rd4
